# DD: Major Discoveries (2026-03-28)

## Overview

The DD (대발견, Major Discovery) series contains 108 hypotheses exploring paradigm-shifting
approaches to consciousness engineering. Starting from mathematical constants (DD1-DD20),
through physics/biology analogies (DD21-DD40), consciousness theory (DD41-DD55),
empirical laws (DD56-DD85), wave mechanics (DD86-DD100), and extreme scaling (DD101-DD108).

Baseline: Phi ~ 1.0 (standard MitosisEngine, 2 cells, 100 steps)
